message:
fix(ci): Pre-build benchmarks in setup phase to avoid per-job timeouts

The benchmark build step compiles 7.8MB of frozen C code, taking
10+ minutes per benchmark. With GitHub cache service issues causing
misses, each parallel job was building from scratch and timing out.

Changes:
- Add build-benchmarks option to setup-edgebox action
- Pre-build all 5 benchmarks during setup (cached together)
- Remove per-benchmark cache/build steps from workflow
- Bump cache key to v3, include bench/*.js and polyfills in hash
- Increase timeout to 60 min for first run

First run: ~45 min (deps + benchmarks), cached runs: ~5 min

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,10 @@ inputs:
     description: 'Build test262 runner'
     required: false
     default: 'false'
+  build-benchmarks:
+    description: 'Build all benchmark WASM files'
+    required: false
+    default: 'false'
 
 runs:
   using: 'composite'
@@ -61,10 +65,11 @@ runs:
       with:
         path: |
           zig-out/bin/
+          zig-out/cache/
           vendor/binaryen/
           vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/build/
           vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/
-        key: edgebox-full-v2-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig') }}
+        key: edgebox-full-v3-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig', 'bench/*.js', 'src/polyfills/*.js') }}
 
     # === Build Binaryen (if cache miss) ===
     - name: Build Binaryen
@@ -99,6 +104,18 @@ runs:
         zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dcpu=baseline
         ${{ inputs.build-test262 == 'true' && 'zig build test262 -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dcpu=baseline' || '' }}
 
+    # === Build benchmarks (if cache miss and requested) ===
+    - name: Build Benchmarks
+      if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true' && inputs.build-benchmarks == 'true'
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        echo "Building all benchmarks (this takes ~10 min due to frozen function compilation)..."
+        for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive; do
+          echo "Building $bench..."
+          ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/$bench.js
+        done
+        ls -la zig-out/bin/bench/
+
     # === Install binaryen system-wide (on cache hit, since build step is skipped) ===
     - name: Install Binaryen (cache hit)
       if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'

@@ -12,10 +12,10 @@ concurrency:
 
 jobs:
   # 5 parallel benchmark jobs
-  # All share the same setup cache (setup-edgebox caches ALL outputs)
+  # All share the same setup cache (setup-edgebox caches ALL outputs including benchmarks)
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 45
+    timeout-minutes: 60  # First run needs ~45 min (build deps + benchmarks), cached ~5 min
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -44,22 +44,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-edgebox
         with:
           install-hyperfine: 'true'
-          install-porffor: 'false'
-
-      - name: Cache benchmark build
-        id: bench-cache
-        uses: actions/cache@v4
-        with:
-          path: |
-            zig-out/bin/bench/${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}.*
-          key: benchmark-${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}-${{ hashFiles(format('bench/{0}.js', matrix.benchmark.file), 'src/polyfills/**/*.js', 'build.zig') }}
-
-      - name: Build benchmark
-        if: steps.bench-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
-        run: |
-          echo "Building ${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}..."
-          ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}.js
-          ls -la zig-out/bin/bench/
+          build-benchmarks: 'true'  # Pre-build all benchmarks (cached with setup)
 
       - name: Run Benchmark - ${{ matrix.benchmark.title }}
         run: |
